text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: One two, one two... That's more like it!
choice_data_list: Why don't you take a breather?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No need! I have steeled myself for this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm at the midpoint of the 3,600-meter finish line!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the CBC Sho the same way I won the
Hakodate Sprint Stakes!
